title: Mezzo's Money
description: Working ATM and money to depose and withdraw
body:
# Mezzos Money Mod This mod adds a fully functional ATM and cash to your world. Players are able to depose or withdraw cash from their bank balance. The bank balance is stored in minecraft scoreboard so it is easier for server admins to manage players money. Scoreboard: _BankAccount_ Due to the Minecraft scoreboard's refresh rate, the scoreboard must be displayed for Team white permanently. Otherwise the mod cannot display the correct bank balance. By default, it is not visible to any player unless they switch to Team white using a command. So it shouldn't bother anyone. ## Usage Get the ATM out of the Creative Tab (cannot be crafted yet) and place it. Right click it. A GUI should open. You are able to see your Bank Balance here and you can depose money by putting cash in the slot and hitting the "depose" button. To withdraw money just type the amount you want to withdraw in the black field and hit "withdraw". The cash should automatically be added to players inventory. ## Supported versions Multiplayer support since 1.1 -> NOT 1.0 ✅ Fabric ⚠️ Forge (only 1.20.1 and 1.19.4) Visit [Sarocesch](https://modrinth.com/mod/saros-money) for more Forge support ❌ Neoforge ❌ Quilt ## Bugs Please report any bugs on my discord. It means much to me!

## Credits A big thanks to [Sarocesch](https://modrinth.com/user/Sarocesch) for allowing me to use his money textures. His linktree can be found [here](https://minewache.de/links) I am also thankfull because [Kanaavi](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/kanaavi/) allowed me to use the ATM 3D block model.
